description: Coverage map for ALL_CAPS tokens found in task Markdown command-sensitive contexts. Schema commands are derived from command.schema.json; screen aliases/UI-local/out-of-scope tokens are derived from screen-command-coverage.json. This file only classifies task-local tokens that are intentionally events or documented non-command enums.

eventOnlyTokens.BATTLE_INITIATED: Event emitted when an encounter creates pending battle state; schema-backed completion uses BATTLE_RESOLVED.
eventOnlyTokens.CARAVAN_ARRIVED: Planned event emitted by the caravan transfer system.
eventOnlyTokens.CARAVAN_INTERCEPTED: Planned event emitted by the caravan transfer system.
eventOnlyTokens.DAY_START: Calendar/event-log marker emitted after END_DAY advances the day.
eventOnlyTokens.DESYNC_DETECTED: Network diagnostic event, not a gameplay command.
eventOnlyTokens.HERO_LEVEL_UP: Event emitted for level-up UI and sound bindings; command schema uses LEVEL_UP.
eventOnlyTokens.STALLED_PEER: Lockstep transport event emitted on per-peer pending-queue overflow (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.WILL_BACKGROUND: Visibility transport message type sent by a peer entering visibilitychange:hidden so receiving peers extend heartbeat tolerance per docs/architecture/visibility-policy.md (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.STATE_HASH_PROBE: Visibility transport message type emitted on visibilitychange:visible to request a peer state-hash comparison per docs/architecture/visibility-policy.md (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.STATE_HASH_AGREE: Reply to STATE_HASH_PROBE indicating hashes match; the match resumes normally (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.STATE_HASH_DISAGREE: Reply to STATE_HASH_PROBE indicating divergence; hands off to the standard reconnection / desync flow (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.AI_ERROR: AI worker error response message type, emitted on uncaught worker exception; the dispatcher falls back to the per-difficulty no-action fallback per ai-contract.md § 4.
eventOnlyTokens.AI_TRACE_REQUEST: Dev-only AI worker request message type emitted by the AI inspector overlay; not part of the canonical command log per ai-contract.md § 7.
eventOnlyTokens.AI_TRACE_RESULT: Dev-only AI worker response message type carrying wants/scored/command/reasoning; not part of the canonical command log per ai-contract.md § 7.
eventOnlyTokens.PEER_PENDING: Signaling event emitted to the host when a joiner is awaiting approval per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md § 6 (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.PEER_REJECTED: Signaling event emitted to a joiner that was rejected or auto-rejected on the 30 s pending timeout per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.PEER_KICKED: Signaling event emitted to a peer that was kicked by the host (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.JOIN_ATTEMPT_REJECTED: Signaling event emitted to the host once per 30 s aggregating rejected join attempts per docs/architecture/signaling-rate-limits.md (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.ROOM_EXPIRED: Signaling event emitted to all peers when the room TTL fires per docs/architecture/lobby-identifiers.md § 7 (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.ROOM_CLOSED: Signaling event emitted to all peers when the host issues CLOSE_ROOM per docs/architecture/lobby-identifiers.md § 7 (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.RATE_LIMITED: Signaling rejection reply emitted on bucket exhaustion per docs/architecture/signaling-rate-limits.md § 3 (Phase-3 multiplayer).
eventOnlyTokens.TOWN_VISITED: Event emitted after a hero enters a town.
eventOnlyTokens.UNIT_MOVED: Combat or renderer event consumed by animation/sound.
eventOnlyTokens.WEEK_START: Calendar/event-log marker emitted on week rollover.

documentedNonCommandTokens.ALL_CAPS: Documentation term used by command-literal lint task.
documentedNonCommandTokens.HMAC_SHA1: Cryptographic algorithm name used in TURN credential format.
documentedNonCommandTokens.INPUT_DELAY_BUDGETS: Constants object exported from src/net/webrtc/constants.ts (Phase-3 multiplayer).
documentedNonCommandTokens.JOIN_HANDSHAKE: Signaling server handshake message type (Phase-3 multiplayer).
documentedNonCommandTokens.JOIN_REJECTED: Signaling server rejection message type (Phase-3 multiplayer).
documentedNonCommandTokens.APPROVE_PEER: Lobby host-approval command surface; owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md.
documentedNonCommandTokens.REJECT_PEER: Lobby host-approval rejection command; owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md.
documentedNonCommandTokens.KICK_PEER: Lobby host-side kick command; owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md.
documentedNonCommandTokens.MUTE_PEER: Local-only chat-suppression command surface; owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation.
documentedNonCommandTokens.REPORT_PEER: Local audit-log writer command surface; owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.14-host-approval-and-moderation per docs/architecture/signaling-audit-log.md § 7.
documentedNonCommandTokens.CLOSE_ROOM: Lobby host-initiated room close command; owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.01-signaling-server-node-js-websocket-lobby per docs/architecture/lobby-identifiers.md § 7.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SEND_GAME_CHAT: Reserved in-game chat payload type carried on the dedicated `chat` DataChannel (Phase-3 multiplayer); never enters the reducer (`state.net.game.chat`). Screen package and full registration land with the in-game chat UI post-M5.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SPELL_EFFECT: Spell animation/effect event name in task prose.
documentedNonCommandTokens.JOIN_FAILED: Closed signaling wire-error code from content-schema/schemas/signaling-error.schema.json; not a UI command. Owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.20-signaling-observability-and-error-vocabulary per services/signaling/error-codes.md.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SERVER_ERROR: Closed signaling wire-error code from content-schema/schemas/signaling-error.schema.json; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.OWNER_NOTICE: Signaling owner-only authenticated channel envelope from content-schema/schemas/signaling-error.schema.json; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.INVALID_SIGNATURE: Closed pack-signature error code from content-schema/schemas/signature-error.schema.json; not a UI command. Owned by mvp.00-core-architecture.22-03-crypto-rules-and-signature-error.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SIGNATURE_DISABLED: Closed pack-signature error code from content-schema/schemas/signature-error.schema.json; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.REPLAY_EXPORT: Closed audit-log-entry type from content-schema/schemas/audit-log-entry.schema.json; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.POLICY_ACCEPTED: Closed audit-log-entry type from content-schema/schemas/audit-log-entry.schema.json; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.OPT_IN_TOGGLED: Closed audit-log-entry type from content-schema/schemas/audit-log-entry.schema.json; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.PROTOCOL_MISMATCH: Closed peerFailureReason enum value from docs/architecture/wiki/screens/64-network-lobby/spec.md; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.NETWORK_ERROR: Closed peerFailureReason enum value from docs/architecture/wiki/screens/64-network-lobby/spec.md; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.NODE_ENV: Node.js process-environment variable; not a command. Used by transport-security.md § 5 to gate dev vs. prod listener behavior.
documentedNonCommandTokens.NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED: Node.js TLS-bypass environment variable; forbidden in non-test code paths per docs/architecture/transport-security.md § 2.
documentedNonCommandTokens.TRUST_VIOLATION_DETECTED: Multiplayer trust-violation dispatch surface owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.26-signed-signaling-envelope per docs/architecture/signaling-envelope.md § 5; closed `kind` enum spans dtls-fingerprint-pinning.md, command-stream-integrity.md, and signaling-envelope.md. Not a UI command; surfaced via the trust-violation banner in screens/64-network-lobby.
documentedNonCommandTokens.MINT_SESSION_TOKEN: Multiplayer host-only token-mint command owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.25-peer-keypair-and-session-token per docs/architecture/signaling-envelope.md § 7; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.VERIFY_SIGNALING_ENVELOPE: Multiplayer envelope-verification command owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.26-signed-signaling-envelope per docs/architecture/signaling-envelope.md § 5; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.ROTATE_PEER_KEYPAIR: Multiplayer keypair-rotation command surface; reserved by phase-3.01-multiplayer.25-peer-keypair-and-session-token. UI flow deferred to M7 per docs/architecture/peer-identity.md § 10.
documentedNonCommandTokens.RECEIVE_TURN_CREDENTIALS: Multiplayer TURN credential-receipt command owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.33-turn-credentials-doctrine-issuance per docs/architecture/turn-credentials.md; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.REQUEST_TURN_REFRESH: Multiplayer TURN credential-refresh command owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.33-turn-credentials-doctrine-issuance per docs/architecture/turn-credentials.md § 6; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.TURN_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED: Multiplayer TURN credential-watchdog event owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.33-turn-credentials-doctrine-issuance; not a UI command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.CONNECTION_FAILED_RELAY_UNAVAILABLE: TURN-down failure dispatch owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.35-edge-defense-and-health-segregation per docs/architecture/turn-fallback-policy.md; surfaces the lobby `relayUnavailable` state.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SIGNALING_RATE_LIMITED: Client-side rate-limited reaction owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.35-edge-defense-and-health-segregation; consumes the `RATE_LIMITED` envelope per signaling-message-schema.md.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SIGNALING_ROOM_FULL: Client-side room-full reaction owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.35-edge-defense-and-health-segregation; consumes the `ROOM_FULL` envelope per signaling-message-schema.md.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SIGNALING_VALIDATION_FAILED: Client-side trust event owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation per docs/architecture/signaling-message-schema.md § 4.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SIGNALING_PAYLOAD_REJECTED: Server-side metric event owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation; surfaced via the admin /metrics endpoint per signaling-health-endpoints.md.
documentedNonCommandTokens.CAPTCHA_REQUIRED: CAPTCHA-escalation command owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.35-edge-defense-and-health-segregation per docs/architecture/signaling-edge-defense.md § 3; mounts a Turnstile / hCaptcha verifier in the lobby.
documentedNonCommandTokens.CAPTCHA_VERIFIED: CAPTCHA-verifier success command owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.35-edge-defense-and-health-segregation; replays the originating action with the verified token.
documentedNonCommandTokens.IP_BLOCKLISTED: Client-side blocklist reaction owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.35-edge-defense-and-health-segregation per docs/architecture/signaling-edge-defense.md § 4; surfaces the generic relay-unavailable copy without confirming blocklist state.
documentedNonCommandTokens.MAX_PAYLOAD_BYTES: Pinned `ws`-library hardening constant owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation per docs/architecture/signaling-message-schema.md § 5; not a command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.PING_INTERVAL_MS: Pinned `ws`-library hardening constant owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation per docs/architecture/signaling-message-schema.md § 5; not a command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.PING_TIMEOUT_MS: Pinned `ws`-library hardening constant owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation per docs/architecture/signaling-message-schema.md § 5; not a command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.UPGRADE_DEADLINE_MS: Pinned `ws`-library hardening constant owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation per docs/architecture/signaling-message-schema.md § 5; not a command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.FRAME_DEADLINE_MS: Pinned `ws`-library hardening constant owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation per docs/architecture/signaling-message-schema.md § 5; not a command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.BINARY_FRAMES_REJECTED: Pinned `ws`-library hardening constant owned by phase-3.01-multiplayer.31-signaling-message-schema-and-validation per docs/architecture/signaling-message-schema.md § 5; not a command.
documentedNonCommandTokens.ADMIN_TOKEN: Bearer-auth env var consumed by phase-3.01-multiplayer.35-edge-defense-and-health-segregation per docs/architecture/signaling-health-endpoints.md § 2; not a command.
